message:
🌱 kubevela: last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when shared-resource (#788)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevela-6863-last-applied-configuration-contains-generated-fields-when-shared-r",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevela: last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when shared-resource policy is used",
+    "description": "last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when shared-resource policy is used. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevela deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubevela version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
helm list -n kubevela 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kubevela installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevela configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevela configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
kubectl get configmap -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevela
```
When applying a shared resource from the second application, `last-applied-configuration` ends up containing all of the contents of a live manifest, rather than the manifest that was applied, thus breaking all of the subsequent applies

**To"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when…",
+        "description": "### Description of your changes

copilot:all

Fixes #

I have:

### How has this code been tested

### Special notes for your reviewer
```yaml
apiVersion: core.oam.dev/v1beta1
kind: Application
metadata:
  name: app-1
spec:
  components:
    - name: my-component
      type: k8s-objects
      properties:
        objects:
          - apiVersion: v1
            kind: Pod
            metadata:
              name: static-web
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: web
                  image: nginx
                  ports:
                    - name: web
                      containerPort: 80
                      protocol: TCP
  policies:
    - name: shared-pod
      type: shared-resource
      properties:
  
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
kubectl get events -n kubevela --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "last-applied-configuration contains generated fields when…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "### Description of your changes

copilot:all

Fixes #

I have:

### How has this code been tested

### Special notes for your reviewer",

spec:

              name: static-web
            spec:
              containers:
                - name: web
                  image: nginx
                  ports:
                    - name: web
                      containerPort: 80
                      protocol: TCP
  policies:
    - name: shared-pod
      type: shared-resource
      properties:
        rules:
          - selector:
              resourceTypes: ["Pod"]",

      properties:
        rules:
          - selector:
              resourceTypes: ["Pod"]",
